description_long: This is a vintage cylindrical metal canister with a slightly domed, removable lid and a wide body, showing signs of age and wear with patches of paint loss and rust. The front features a large, oval, cream-colored label bordered in red, with ornate black script reading 'Lichen Pulmonar. Plucnik.' The canister's surface is predominantly a dark, muted gray, with visible scuffs and abrasions, especially on the back and sides. The lid fits snugly on top, suggesting the container was designed to keep its contents secure and protected from moisture or contamination. The overall construction appears robust, typical of old apothecary or pharmacy storage containers used for medicinal herbs or powders. No visible branding or modern safety features are present, giving it an antique, utilitarian appearance.
description: A weathered, cylindrical metal canister with a domed lid and a large, ornate label reading 'Lichen Pulmonar. Plucnik.' The surface is dark gray with visible wear and rust patches.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate label 'Lichen Pulmonar. Plucnik.' clearly, with the canister's lid and most of the wear visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the label partially visible, highlighting the canister's cylindrical shape and more of the worn, dark gray surface.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the most extensive wear and rust, with no label visible and the plain metal surface exposed.
description_view_3: Angled side view with the edge of the label visible, showing both the label and the worn metal surface.
